english: The rocket lifted off from the launch site.

sentence: 这个花瓶上有漂亮的彩绘。
pinyin: Zhège huāpíng shàng yǒu piàoliang de cǎihuì.
english: This vase has beautiful painted designs on it.

sentence: 她买了一件黄绿色的上衣。
pinyin: Tā mǎi le yī jiàn huánglǜsè de shàngyī.

sentence: 医生向她介绍了避孕的方法。
pinyin: Yīshēng xiàng tā jièshào le bìyùn de fāngfǎ.
english: The doctor explained contraception methods to her.

sentence: 费拉是埃及农村的普通百姓。
pinyin: Fèilā shì Āijí nóngcūn de pǔtōng bǎixìng.
english: Fellah refers to ordinary rural folk in Egypt.
